hints.description: This company is a leading distributor of building products, offering a wide range of lumber, structural components, roofing, siding, windows, doors, and other related items. They primarily serve residential builders, but also work with commercial construction and repair/remodel markets. CEO Jeff Sarinski has overseen significant growth through acquisitions and a focus on providing value-added services like design and engineering support.
hints.funFact1: In 2015, the company was formed through the merger of BMC West and ProBuild Distribution, creating a significantly larger player in the building materials distribution landscape.
hints.funFact2: The company operates over 500 locations across the United States and Canada, demonstrating a vast and geographically diverse network to serve its customer base.
